summary: Fix read-modify-write race in logInvocation and updateMetrics. Previously, concurrent callers read stale JSON snapshot outside the _writePromise queue, mutated in memory, then only serialized the write — last writer wins, earlier entries lost. Now the entire read-mutate-write transaction runs inside the _writePromise chain. Atomic write (tmp+rename with EPERM fallback) inlined to avoid double-queuing.
notes: Same pattern as event-store fix (c6edca1). Race regression test verifies 10 concurrent logInvocation calls preserve all 10 entries and 5 concurrent calls increment metrics by exactly 5. Shared test env (_tool-usage-env.js) prevents module singleton path conflicts across test files. 30/30 learning-engine tests pass. Public API unchanged.
